electroacoustic.frequency_range_hz: A15i Wide: 42 Hz - 20 kHz; A15i Focus: 41 Hz - 20 kHz (usable bandwidth, -10 dB, [A15] preset)
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 144 dB for A15i Focus and 141 dB for A15i Wide; peak at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4, [A15] preset. Values shown are for non-LA2Xi amplification; refer to LA2Xi spec sheet for LA2Xi-driven SPL.
electroacoustic.directivity: Two enclosure variants share the cabinet: A15i Wide has 30 deg enclosure coverage, A15i Focus has 10 deg. Both use Panflex L-Fins for selectable horizontal directivity: 70 deg or 110 deg symmetric, or 90 deg asymmetric (35/55 or 55/35).
electroacoustic.components: 2-way passive constant-curvature WST design. LF: 1 x 15 in cone driver (bass-reflex, L-Vents). HF: 1 x 3 in diaphragm neodymium compression driver on DOSC waveguide with L-Fins.

amplification.per_amplifier_note: Per-amplifier values are total enclosures across the controller (1 per output on LA4X/LA2Xi; 3 per output / 12 total on LA12X; 1 per output / 10 total on LA7.16i). LA2Xi BTL halves capacity to 2 total.

connection.input_connector: 1x 4-point terminal block with push-in connection; each terminal set (+ and -) is interchangeable as IN or LINK for parallel daisy-chaining
connection.breakouts: Supplied connector sealing plate with two cable glands (input cable plus a plugged second gland for the parallel link cable); glands accept cables up to 2 x 4 mm2 / 12 AWG. For LA4X/LA12X, custom speakON-to-bare-wire cables connect to the terminal block.

physical.weight_note: A15i Focus 32 kg / 71 lb; A15i Wide 29 kg / 64 lb (net). Connectors page lists Focus at 33 kg / 73 lb.
physical.dimensions_mm: A15i Wide: 752 W x 180 H x ~521 D (front face tapers, 494/525 across body); A15i Focus: 752 W x 345 H x ~516 D (424/490/522 across body). Heights differ because of the wider enclosure's shallower wedge.
physical.cabinet: Premium-grade Baltic beech and birch plywood; coated steel grille with acoustically neutral 3D fabric. Finishes: dark grey brown Pantone 426 C, pure white RAL 9010, or custom RAL on order.

deployment.max_per_flown_array: Safe use without Soundvision verification: 8 A15i Wide/Focus in a vertical array, or 3 in a horizontal array. Other configurations must be checked for mechanical safety in Soundvision.
deployment.inter_element_angles: A15i Wide and A15i Focus can be freely mixed within one array; combine the 30 deg and 10 deg enclosures plus custom L-Fin settings to shape vertical SPL mapping and throw.
rigging_accessories: A15iWIDE-LINK / A15iFOCUS-LINK and ENDLINK rigging plates
KS21i-SLINK / KS21i-ENDSLINK for mounting on/under KS21i

usage: Medium-throw passive line-source element for permanent installs; A15i Wide (30 deg) suits broad mains and center clusters, while A15i Focus (10 deg) projects up to roughly 45 m for longer-throw zones.

Runs on a single amplifier channel and shares one universal [A15] preset across both variants and all L-Fin settings, so plug-and-play with no per-enclosure tuning. Use [A15_FI] for short-throw fills and [A15_MO] for monitor duty.
Plan amp loading by total enclosures per controller: 12 on an LA12X, 10 on an LA7.16i, 4 on an LA4X, 4 on an LA2Xi in SE mode (only 2 in BTL).

Pair with KS21i subwoofers (flown or ground-stacked) to reinforce the low-frequency contour and extend response down to about 29 Hz; apply the listed pre-alignment delays (e.g. ~9 ms on the tops with [KS21_60_C]).
Single enclosures work well as front-fill or delay point sources, with Panflex L-Fins selecting 70, 90, or 110 deg horizontal coverage to match audience geometry.

IP55 rating, sealed terminal-block input with cable glands, and weatherable finishes make it appropriate for semi-exposed venues; always verify arrays beyond 8-high vertical / 3-wide horizontal in Soundvision.
